title: Review: relay/state payment_watcher keyfile daemon/store bot tui
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Two P0 bugs (keyfile non-atomic write, invite code never consumed) are real and actionable. The DM plaintext issue is a systemic design gap that was likely known but undocumented. The rest are P1-P2 hardening items.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: payment_watcher IVK trial decryption correctness (depends on wallet/scanner internals not reviewed here), the BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction in use_space_invite_code (correct as written, but subtle), and whether the space_invite unlimited-redemption was intentional (the comment says 'multi-use invites' are possible but there is no uses_remaining column). Would raise confidence with: integration tests for invite redemption (single-use vs multi-use), and a test that verifies keyfile write failure leaves no partial file.
